title: galium quitense
intro: Galium quitense is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Peru. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Galium quitense include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Galium quitense is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
